title: Breakable+
description: Plugin allows you to gather many unobtainable blocks(like spawners, budding amethyst blocks)
body:
# This plugin lets you get a pickaxe that can gather ANYTHING!

# Questions and Answers:
Q: Why plugin does not work on my server?\
A: Make sure you are using server with version 1.21.4 or higher(you can check that using /ver).

Q: My server is version X and plugin is version Y will it work?\
A: As long as server version is not lower than plugin version it should work, if not then let me know in Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD) and im gonna update it for you.

Q: How does the plugin work?\
A: After installing plugin just type the /breakableplus command into chat to get special pickaxe(make sure you are opped/have permision on the server, otherwise, command won't do anything).

Q: I need additional support, where do i get it?\
A: In our Community server [https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD](https://discord.gg/rTYGmfzkkD).
